pages.title: The Official eVisa website for Indonesia
pages.heading: General Information

submits.text: Sign In
General Information
FAQ
What is an Visitor Visa?
What do I need for my Visitor Visa request?
What are the advantages of Visitor Visa?
Does having Visitor Visa guarantee entry to Indonesia?
If I have already obtained the Visitor Visa, what should I do after arriving at the entry port?
What should I do if the information I provide in the Visitor Visa is incorrect?
Do I need to enter Indonesia on the exact date specified in my request?
How do you protect the information that I share during my Visitor Visa request process?
Do I need to obtain a separate Visitor Visa for people accompanying me?
Can I obtain a multiple-entry Visitor Visa?
The information on my Visitor Visa does not fully match the information on my passport.Can I enter Indonesia with this Visitor Visa?
I want to stay in Indonesia for longer than the Visitor Visa permits.What should I do?
Overstay
I have realized that some of the information that I provided in the Visitor Visa request requires correction.What should I do?
I have completed my request. When will I obtain my Visitor Visa?
How long before my travel date should I apply for Visitor Visa?
I have realized that some information on my Visitor Visa does not match the information on my travel document. I know that my Visitor Visa is invalid. Can I get a refund?
I do not want to apply for an Visitor Visa. Can I get a visa on arrival?
Do I need an Visitor Visa if I am on a cruise ship?
My child is included in my passport. Do I need to make a separate Visitor Visa request for them?
Can the citizens of all the countries eligible for Visitor Visa obtain a visa on arrival at the port of entry?
How much is an Visitor Visa fee?
How long will my Visitor Visa be valid for?
Do I have to obtain a visa if I do not leave the international transit area?
Why is there a service fee?
May I apply for a new Visitor Visa while I am in Indonesia?
I have further question. What should I do?
I have applied for a visa at an Indonesian Embassy/ Consulate and wish to be updated on my request. Can I send a request for an update from the Visitor Visa Support Desk?
PAYMENT
